description_long: This humanoid robot features a robust, angular design with a predominantly gray and black color scheme accented by orange highlights. Its head is helmet-like with a central crest and a visor area, giving it a futuristic, armored appearance. The shoulders are broad and equipped with large, wing-like protrusions, while the arms and legs are heavily segmented and reinforced, suggesting strength and durability. The back displays a prominent orange spike and additional mechanical details, enhancing its mechanical and combat-ready look. The hands and feet are blocky, with visible joints and mechanical components, indicating articulated movement. Overall, the robot's design is reminiscent of a mecha or combat android, built for urban environments and possibly for defense or patrol duties.
description: A heavily armored, angular humanoid robot with gray, black, and orange accents, featuring wing-like shoulders and a helmeted head. Its design is robust and mechanical, suggesting strength and advanced articulation.
description_view_0: Front view shows the helmeted head, broad chest, wing-like shoulder protrusions, and articulated arms and legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the shoulder wings, the central crest, and the orange spike extending from the back.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the prominent orange back spike, mechanical details on the back, and the symmetrical design of the legs and arms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the profile of the head, shoulder, and leg armor, as well as the back spike.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly bent at the elbows and legs straight. The head is facing forward, and the torso is erect. Shoulder wings are extended outward.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the robot is covered in integrated armor panels and mechanical components with angular, decorative elements.
attribute_facial_features: The face consists of a helmet-like structure with a central crest and a dark visor area, lacking a visible mouth or nose. No expressive features are present.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have multiple visible hinge and rotary joints at the shoulders, elbows, wrists, hips, knees, and ankles, allowing for a wide range of motion. Limbs appear robust and articulated.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Possible visual sensor in the visor area of the head; no other sensors are visibly apparent.
